task_description: A cascading outage affected all services starting at 21:19 UTC. The 'catalog-service' service crashed repeatedly, propagating failures through the dependency chain.

commits.author: carol@company.com
commits.message: perf: fix edge case in rate limiter

commits.author: grace@company.com
commits.message: security: optimize circuit breaker for high throughput
commits.diff:
--- a/catalog-service-service/circuit_breaker.go
+++ b/catalog-service-service/circuit_breaker.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 15
+config.Timeout = 5 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
